trades.reasoning: Full four-signal confirmation (RSI in bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, histogram rising, price above SMA-20, volume surge) with the top momentum score despite a neutral broader market.
Matches DXCM with all four confirming signals and a top score of 100, indicating genuine institutional participation rather than a random spike.

decisions.briefing: Markets were mildly negative today (NASDAQ -0.9%, S&P 500 -0.3%), but two candidates, DXCM and IMOS, showed the full four-signal bullish confirmation (RSI, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge) that past reviews flagged as high-conviction setups, so we deployed some of the open cash into them rather than waiting purely for a broad risk-on day.

market_education.summary_en: Major indices drifted lower today with NASDAQ down 0.9% and the S&P 500 down 0.3%, a mild pullback rather than a broad risk-off move. Within that soft tape, a handful of individual names bucked the trend with strong technical setups, showing that stock-specific momentum can diverge from index-level direction. No major single catalyst news was available to cite for today's move.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤普遍走弱，納斯達克指數下跌0.9%，標普500指數下跌0.3%，屬於溫和回檔而非全面risk-off。不過在大盤疲弱的背景下，仍有少數個股憑藉強勁的技術面訊號逆勢走強，顯示個股動能有時會脫離大盤走勢。今日並無明確的重大新聞可作為此次波動的引用來源。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When multiple independent technical signals — like RSI in a healthy range, a MACD bullish crossover, rising momentum, price above its moving average, and a volume surge — all line up on the same stock, it suggests real buying interest rather than noise. This can justify a selective buy even when the overall market is flat or slightly down.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當多個獨立的技術指標——例如RSI處於健康區間、MACD出現黃金交叉、動能上升、股價站上均線、以及成交量放大——同時在同一檔股票上出現時，通常代表真實的買盤力道，而非雜訊。即使大盤持平或小幅下跌，這樣的訊號組合仍可支持精選買入的決定。
